name: finanzas-conductuales
description: Aplicacion personal de finanzas basada en principios de economia conductual.

scripts.android:sync: npm run build:mobile && npx cap sync android
scripts.android:apk: npm run android:sync && cd android && gradlew.bat assembleDebug
scripts.android:open: npm run android:sync && npx cap open android
scripts.check: node --check app.js && node --check finance-core.js && node --check sync-client.js && node --check server.mjs && node --check tests/finance-core.test.mjs && node --check tests/pwa.test.mjs && node --check tests/sync-client.test.mjs
